nasb.text: Now in charge of the tribes of Israel: chief officer for the Reubenites was Eliezer the son of Zichri; for the Simeonites, Shephatiah the son of Maacah;

esv.text: Over the tribes of Israel, for the Reubenites, Eliezer the son of Zichri was chief officer; for the Simeonites, Shephatiah the son of Maacah;

cnv.text: 掌管以色列各支派的記在下面：流本支派的首領是細基利的兒子以利以謝；西緬支派的首領是瑪迦的兒子示法提雅；

ccb.text: 以下是以色列各支派的首领：吕便支派的首领是细基利的儿子以利以谢；西缅支派的首领是玛迦的儿子示法提雅；
